    /* Emoji category headers */
    .emoji-cat-label{
      font-size:10px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.8px;text-transform:uppercase;
      color:var(--t3);padding:8px 2px 5px;
    }

    /* ── EMPTY STATE ── */
    .empty{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:100%;gap:10px;color:var(--t3);text-align:center;padding:30px}
    .empty-icon{font-size:52px;margin-bottom:8px;animation:float 3s ease-in-out infinite}
    @keyframes float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-8px)}}
    .empty h3{font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:var(--t2)}
    .empty p{font-size:12.5px;line-height:1.6;max-width:260px}

    /* ── LOGIN ── */
    #login-overlay{
      position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--bg);
      display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
      z-index:1000;transition:opacity .4s var(--ease),visibility .4s;padding:20px;
    }
    #login-overlay.hidden{opacity:0;visibility:hidden;pointer-events:none}
    #login-card{
      background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--brd2);border-radius:28px;
      padding:44px 40px 36px;width:100%;max-width:390px;
      box-shadow:0 50px 100px rgba(0,0,0,.8),0 0 80px var(--glow);
      animation:card-in .5s var(--ease);position:relative;overflow:hidden;
    }
    #login-card::before{
      content:'';position:absolute;top:-80px;right:-80px;
      width:240px;height:240px;
      background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(124,106,247,.18) 0%,transparent 70%);
      pointer-events:none;
    }
    #login-card::after{
      content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-60px;left:-60px;
      width:200px;height:200px;
      background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(176,106,247,.1) 0%,transparent 70%);
      pointer-events:none;
    }
    @keyframes card-in{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px) scale(.95)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1)}}

    .login-logo-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:28px}
    .login-logo-icon{
      width:56px;height:56px;
      background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a1),var(--a2));
      border-radius:18px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:28px;
      box-shadow:0 0 36px var(--glow);flex-shrink:0;
    }
    .login-logo-text h1{
      font-size:24px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.6px;
      background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--t1) 30%,var(--a1));
      -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
    }
    .login-logo-text p{font-size:12px;color:var(--t3);margin-top:3px}

    .fg{margin-bottom:16px}
    .fl{display:block;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.6px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--t3);margin-bottom:7px}
    .fi-wrap{position:relative}
    .fi-icon{position:absolute;left:13px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);font-size:15px;pointer-events:none}
    .fi{
      width:100%;background:var(--glass2);border:1px solid var(--brd);
      border-radius:12px;color:var(--t1);font-size:14px;
      padding:13px 16px 13px 42px;outline:none;
      transition:border-color .2s,box-shadow .2s;
    }
    .fi:focus{border-color:rgba(124,106,247,.6);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--glow3)}
    .fi::placeholder{color:var(--t3)}

    #login-btn{
      width:100%;padding:14px;
      background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--a1),var(--a2));
      border-radius:12px;color:#fff;
      font-size:15px;font-weight:700;
      box-shadow:0 6px 26px var(--glow);
      transition:transform .15s var(--spring),box-shadow .2s,opacity .15s;
      margin-top:6px;margin-bottom:12px;
      display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;
    }
    #login-btn:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 10px 32px var(--glow)}
    #login-btn:active{transform:translateY(0)}
    #login-btn:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:wait;transform:none}
    #login-err{font-size:12px;color:var(--red);text-align:center;min-height:18px}
    .login-hint{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--t3);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;justify-content:center;margin-top:8px}
    .login-hint span{color:var(--a1)}

    /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
    @media(max-width:700px){
      #sidebar{
        position:fixed;top:0;left:0;height:100%;
        transform:translateX(-100%);z-index:100;
      }
      #sidebar.open{transform:translateX(0);box-shadow:8px 0 40px rgba(0,0,0,.7)}
      #hamburger{display:grid}
      #emoji-panel{
        position:fixed;left:6px;right:6px;bottom:72px;width:auto;
        border-radius:18px 18px 12px 12px;max-height:62vh;z-index:999;
      }
      .ep-body{max-height:calc(62vh - 120px)}
      .media-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
      .emoji-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr)}
      #login-card{padding:32px 24px 28px}
      #login-card .login-logo-text h1{font-size:20px}
      #typing-pill{display:none}
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>

<div id="app">
  <div id="sidebar-backdrop" onclick="closeSidebar()"></div>

  <!-- SIDEBAR -->
  <aside id="sidebar">
    <div id="brand">
      <div id="brand-logo">⬡</div>
      <div>
        <div id="brand-name">MultiChat</div>
        <div id="brand-sub">realtime · websocket</div>
      </div>
      <div id="brand-status"></div>
    </div>

    <div id="search-box">
      <input id="search" type="text" placeholder="Tìm người dùng…" autocomplete="off" aria-label="Tìm người dùng"/>
    </div>

    <div class="ns ns-rooms">
      <div class="ns-head"> Phòng chat</div>
      <div id="rooms-list">
        <div class="nr active" data-room="global" onclick="App.switchRoom('global')">
          <div class="nr-av" style="background:rgba(245,191,66,.13);color:var(--gold);font-size:20px"></div>
          <div class="nr-info">
            <div class="nr-name">Phòng chung</div>
            <div class="nr-sub">Mọi người</div>
          </div>
          <div id="badge-global" class="nr-badge" style="display:none"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="ns ns-users">
      <div class="ns-head"> Trực tuyến <span class="ns-count" id="online-count">0</span></div>
      <div id="users-list"></div>
    </div>

    <div id="my-profile">
      <div id="my-av"><div class="sdot"></div></div>
      <div id="my-info">
        <div id="my-name">Chưa đăng nhập</div>
        <div id="my-tag">#——</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </aside>

  <!-- MAIN -->
  <main id="main">
    <div id="chat-header">
      <div class="ch-left">
        <button id="hamburger" onclick="openSidebar()">☰</button>
        <div id="ch-av" style="background:rgba(245,191,66,.13);color:var(--gold)"></div>
        <div class="ch-text">
          <div id="ch-name">Phòng chung</div>
          <div id="ch-sub">Nơi mọi người gặp nhau</div>
        </div>
        <div id="typing-pill"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="hdr-right">
        <button class="hdr-btn" onclick="openSidebar()" title="Thành viên"></button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div id="msgs-wrap"><div id="msgs">
      <div class="empty">
        <div class="empty-icon"></div>
        <h3>Chào mừng đến MultiChat</h3>
        <p>Đăng nhập để bắt đầu trò chuyện với mọi người trong phòng</p>
      </div>
    </div></div>

    <div id="typing-bar"></div>

    <div id="input-bar">
      <!-- Image attach preview -->
      <div id="img-attach-preview"></div>

      <div id="input-row">
        <!-- Emoji toggle -->
        <div style="position:relative">
          <button class="tool-btn" id="emoji-btn" type="button" title="Emoji / GIF / Sticker"></button>
          <!-- Panel -->
          <div id="emoji-panel" onclick="event.stopPropagation()"></div>
        </div>

        <!-- Image upload -->
        <button class="tool-btn" id="img-btn" type="button" title="Gửi ảnh" onclick="document.getElementById('file-input').click()">️</button>
        <input type="file" id="file-input" accept="image/*" multiple/>

        <div id="input-wrap">
          <textarea id="msg-input" rows="1" placeholder="Nhắn tin… (Enter gửi · Shift+Enter xuống dòng)" aria-label="Nhập tin nhắn" disabled></textarea>
        </div>
        <button id="send-btn" disabled>↑</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </main>
</div>

<!-- IMAGE PREVIEW OVERLAY -->
<div id="img-preview-overlay">
  <button id="img-preview-close" onclick="closeImgPreview()">✕</button>
  <img id="img-preview-img" src="" alt="preview"/>
</div>

<!-- LOGIN -->
<div id="login-overlay">
  <div id="login-card">
    <div class="login-logo-wrap">
      <div class="login-logo-icon">⬡</div>
      <div class="login-logo-text">
        <h1>MultiChat</h1>
        <p>Chat realtime · Java WebSocket</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="fg">
      <label class="fl" for="inp-user"> Tên hiển thị</label>
      <div class="fi-wrap">
        <span class="fi-icon">✏️</span>
        <input class="fi" id="inp-user" type="text" placeholder="Nhập tên của bạn…" maxlength="24" autocomplete="off"/>
      </div>
    </div>
    <button id="login-btn" onclick="App.login()">
      <span></span> Vào phòng chat
    </button>
    <div id="login-err"></div>
    <div class="login-hint"> Không cần tài khoản · <span>Kết nối an toàn</span></div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  'use strict';

  function openSidebar(){document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.add('open');document.getElementById('sidebar-backdrop').classList.add('visible')}
  function closeSidebar(){document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.remove('open');document.getElementById('sidebar-backdrop').classList.remove('visible')}
  function closeImgPreview(){document.getElementById('img-preview-overlay').classList.remove('open')}
  document.getElementById('img-preview-overlay').addEventListener('click',function(e){if(e.target===this)closeImgPreview()})

  /* ── Palette ── */
  const PAL=[
    ['rgba(99,102,241,.18)','#818cf8'],['rgba(168,85,247,.18)','#c084fc'],
    ['rgba(236,72,153,.18)','#f472b6'],['rgba(20,184,166,.18)','#2dd4bf'],
    ['rgba(245,158,11,.18)','#fbbf24'],['rgba(239,68,68,.18)','#f87171'],
    ['rgba(16,185,129,.18)','#34d399'],['rgba(59,130,246,.18)','#60a5fa'],
    ['rgba(249,115,22,.18)','#fb923c'],['rgba(217,70,239,.18)','#e879f9'],
    ['rgba(14,165,233,.18)','#38bdf8'],['rgba(163,230,53,.18)','#a3e635'],
  ];
  function palOf(key){
    const id=key.includes('#')?key.split('#').pop():key;
    let h=0;for(let i=0;i<id.length;i++)h=(h*31+id.charCodeAt(i))>>>0;
    return PAL[h%PAL.length];
  }
  const dName=k=>k.includes('#')?k.split('#')[0]:k;
  const dTag=k=>k.includes('#')?'#'+k.split('#')[1].toUpperCase():'';
  const esc=s=>(s||'').replace(/&/g,'&').replace(/</g,'<').replace(/>/g,'>');
  const fmtTime=iso=>{
    if(!iso) return '';
    const d=new Date(iso);
    if(isNaN(d.getTime())){
      const m=String(iso).match(/^(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})$/);
      if(m){const x=new Date();x.setHours(+m[1],+m[2],0,0);return x.toLocaleTimeString('vi-VN',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})}
      return typeof iso==='string'?iso:'';
    }
    return d.toLocaleTimeString('vi-VN',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});
  };
  const fmtDate=iso=>{
    if(!iso) return '';
    const d=new Date(iso);
    if(isNaN(d.getTime())) return '';
    const n=new Date();
    if(d.toDateString()===n.toDateString()) return 'Hôm nay';
    const y=new Date(n);y.setDate(n.getDate()-1);
    if(d.toDateString()===y.toDateString()) return 'Hôm qua';
    return d.toLocaleDateString('vi-VN',{day:'2-digit',month:'2-digit',year:'numeric'});
  };

  /* ── Emoji Data ── */
  const EMOJI_CATS = {
    'Gần đây ': ['','','','❤️','','','','','','','',''],
    'Mặt cười ': ['','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','☺️','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','☹️','','','','','','','','','','','','☠️','','','','','',''],
    'Trái tim ': ['❤️','','','','','','','','','','❣️','','','','','','','','','♥️','','',''],
    'Tương tác ': ['','','','','','','','✊','','','✌️','','','','','','','','','','☝️','','','️','✋','','','','','','','',''],
    'Thiên nhiên ': ['','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','⭐','','','✨','☀️','️','⛅','️','️','⛈️','❄️','️',''],
    'Ẩm thực ': ['','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','☕','','','','','','','','',''],
    'Hoạt động ': ['⚽','','','⚾','','','','','','','','','','','','','','⛳','','','','','','','','','','','⛸️','','','⛷️','','','️','','','⛹️','','','','','',''],
    'Du lịch ': ['','','','','','️','','','','','','','','','️','','','','','','','','✈️','️','','','️','','⛵','','️','','','','','','','','',''],
    'Vật thể ': ['','','️','','','','','️','️','','','','','','️','','','','','️','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','','️','','','','','','⌨️','️','️','️','','','','','','','',''],
    'Biểu tượng ✅': ['✅','❌','⭕','','','','','','','⚫','⚪','','','','','','','','','','','','⬛','⬜','◼️','◻️','◾','◽','▪️','▫️','','⚜️','','♻️','✴️','❇️','','','','➰','➿','⁉️','❓','❔','❕','‼️','','','','','','➕','➖','✖️','➗',''],
  };

  const GIF_SAMPLES=[
    {url:'https://media.giphy.com/media/3oEjI6SIIHBdRxXI40/giphy.gif',label:'Loading'},
    {url:'https://media.giphy.com/media/26xBwdIuRJiAIqHwA/giphy.gif',label:'Wow'},
    {url:'https://media.giphy.com/media/l0HlQ7LRalQqdWfao/giphy.gif',label:'Hi'},
    {url:'https://media.giphy.com/media/5GoVLqeAOo6PK/giphy.gif',label:'Cat'},
    {url:'https://media.giphy.com/media/111ebonMs90YLu/giphy.gif',label:'Happy'},
    {url:'https://media.giphy.com/media/13CoXDiaCcCoyk/giphy.gif',label:'Bye'},
    {url:'https://media.giphy.com/media/mlvseq9yvZhba/giphy.gif',label:'OK'},
    {url:'https://media.giphy.com/media/3ohzdIuqJoo8QdKlnW/giphy.gif',label:'Yes'},
    {url:'https://media.giphy.com/media/26BRuo6sLetdllPAQ/giphy.gif',label:'No'},
  ];

  const STICKER_SAMPLES=[
    {url:'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/72x72/1f60d.png',label:'Love'},
    {url:'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/72x72/1f389.png',label:'Party'},
    {url:'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/72x72/1f602.png',label:'Laugh'},
    {url:'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/72x72/1f44d.png',label:'Like'},
    {url:'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/72x72/1f525.png',label:'Fire'},
    {url:'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/72x72/2764-fe0f.png',label:'Heart'},
    {url:'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/72x72/1f4af.png',label:'100'},
    {url:'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/72x72/1f973.png',label:'Celebrate'},
    {url:'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/72x72/1f62d.png',label:'Cry'},
    {url:'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/72x72/1f621.png',label:'Angry'},
    {url:'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/72x72/1fae1.png',label:'Salute'},
    {url:'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/twitter/twemoji@14.0.2/assets/72x72/1f4aa.png',label:'Strong'},
  ];

  const App=(()=>{
    let ws=null,me=null,room='global';
    let allUsers=[],unread={},typing={},typingTm={};
    let history={},lastSndr={},myTyping=false,myTypTm=null;

    const SERVER_URL=(()=>{const p=location.protocol==='https:'?'wss:':'ws:';return p+'//'+location.host})();
    const $=id=>document.getElementById(id);
    const D={
      overlay:$('login-overlay'),inpUser:$('inp-user'),loginBtn:$('login-btn'),loginErr:$('login-err'),
      usersList:$('users-list'),onlineCnt:$('online-count'),msgs:$('msgs'),msgsWrap:$('msgs-wrap'),
      msgInput:$('msg-input'),sendBtn:$('send-btn'),
      emojiBtn:$('emoji-btn'),emojiPanel:$('emoji-panel'),
      chName:$('ch-name'),chSub:$('ch-sub'),chAv:$('ch-av'),
      typingH:$('typing-pill'),typingBar:$('typing-bar'),
      myAv:$('my-av'),myName:$('my-name'),myTag:$('my-tag'),
      search:$('search'),badgeGlb:$('badge-global'),brandSt:$('brand-status'),
      imgPreview:$('img-attach-preview'),fileInput:$('file-input'),
    };

    /* ── Emoji panel state ── */
    let epTab='quick'; // 'quick'|'emoji'|'gif'|'sticker'
    let epEmojiCat=Object.keys(EMOJI_CATS)[0];
    let pendingImages=[]; // {dataUrl, file}

    /* ── MEDIA ENCODING ── */
    const MEDIA_PFX='__MC_MEDIA__';
    // Chỉ encode label (tên file), KHÔNG encode URL/base64 vì base64 không chứa ký tự nguy hiểm
    // và encodeURIComponent làm tăng kích thước lên ~3x gây tràn buffer server
    const encMedia=(kind,url,label='')=>`${MEDIA_PFX}|${kind}|${label}|${url}`;
    function decMedia(c){
      if(typeof c!=='string'||!c.startsWith(MEDIA_PFX+'|')) return null;
      // Format: __MC_MEDIA__|kind|label|url  (url là phần cuối, có thể chứa | trong base64 không)
      const firstPipe=c.indexOf('|');           // sau __MC_MEDIA__
      const secondPipe=c.indexOf('|',firstPipe+1); // sau kind
      const thirdPipe=c.indexOf('|',secondPipe+1); // sau label
      if(thirdPipe<0) return null;
      try{
        const kind=c.slice(firstPipe+1,secondPipe);
        const label=c.slice(secondPipe+1,thirdPipe);
        const url=c.slice(thirdPipe+1);
        if(!kind||!url) return null;
        return{kind,url,label};
      }catch{return null}
    }
    function sendMedia(kind,url,label=''){sendPayload(encMedia(kind,url,label))}

    /* ── EMOJI PANEL RENDER ── */
    function buildEmojiPanel(){
      const TABS=[

        {id:'emoji',icon:'',label:'Emoji'},
        {id:'gif',icon:'GIF',label:'GIF'},
        {id:'sticker',icon:'',label:'Sticker'},
      ];

      let tabsHtml=TABS.map(t=>
        `<button class="ep-tab ${epTab===t.id?'active':''}" data-ep-tab="${t.id}">${t.icon} ${t.label}</button>`
      ).join('');

      let bodyHtml='';

      if(epTab==='emoji'){
        const catKeys=Object.keys(EMOJI_CATS);
        const catSel=EMOJI_CATS[epEmojiCat]||[];
        bodyHtml=`
          <div style="display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:nowrap;overflow-x:auto;margin-bottom:10px;padding-bottom:4px;scrollbar-width:none">
            ${catKeys.map(k=>`<button class="ep-tab ${epEmojiCat===k?'active':''}" data-emoji-cat="${esc(k)}" style="font-size:11px;padding:5px 10px">${k}</button>`).join('')}
          </div>
          <div class="emoji-grid">
            ${catSel.map(e=>`<button class="eg-item" data-insert-emoji="${esc(e)}" title="${e}">${e}</button>`).join('')}
          </div>`;
      } else if(epTab==='gif'){
        bodyHtml=`
          <div class="gif-input-row">
            <input class="gif-url-input" id="gif-url-input" type="text" placeholder="Dán link GIF rồi bấm Gửi…"/>
            <button class="ep-send-gif-btn" data-send-gif-url>Gửi</button>
          </div>
          <div class="emoji-cat-label"> GIF mẫu</div>
          <div class="media-grid">
            ${GIF_SAMPLES.map(g=>`<button class="mg-item" data-media-kind="gif" data-media-url="${esc(g.url)}" data-media-label="${esc(g.label)}" title="${esc(g.label)}"><img src="${esc(g.url)}" alt="${esc(g.label)}" loading="lazy"/><span class="mg-badge">GIF</span></button>`).join('')}
          </div>`;
      } else if(epTab==='sticker'){
        bodyHtml=`
          <div class="emoji-cat-label">️ Sticker</div>
          <div class="media-grid">
            ${STICKER_SAMPLES.map(s=>`<button class="mg-item" data-media-kind="sticker" data-media-url="${esc(s.url)}" data-media-label="${esc(s.label)}" title="${esc(s.label)}"><img src="${esc(s.url)}" alt="${esc(s.label)}" loading="lazy"/><span class="mg-badge">STK</span></button>`).join('')}
          </div>`;
      }

      D.emojiPanel.innerHTML=`
        <div class="ep-tabs">${tabsHtml}</div>
        <div class="ep-body">${bodyHtml}</div>
      `;
    }

    function openEmojiPanel(){D.emojiPanel.classList.add('open');buildEmojiPanel();D.emojiBtn.classList.add('active')}
    function closeEmojiPanel(){D.emojiPanel.classList.remove('open');D.emojiBtn.classList.remove('active')}
    function toggleEmojiPanel(){D.emojiPanel.classList.contains('open')?closeEmojiPanel():openEmojiPanel()}

    D.emojiPanel.addEventListener('click',e=>{
      const tab=e.target.closest('[data-ep-tab]');
      if(tab){epTab=tab.dataset.epTab;buildEmojiPanel();return}

      const catBtn=e.target.closest('[data-emoji-cat]');
      if(catBtn){epEmojiCat=catBtn.dataset.emojiCat;buildEmojiPanel();return}

      const quickEmoji=e.target.closest('[data-quick-emoji]');
      if(quickEmoji){insertTextAtCursor(quickEmoji.dataset.quickEmoji);closeEmojiPanel();return}

      const insertEmoji=e.target.closest('[data-insert-emoji]');
      if(insertEmoji){insertTextAtCursor(insertEmoji.dataset.insertEmoji);return}

      const mediaBtn=e.target.closest('[data-media-kind]');
      if(mediaBtn){sendMedia(mediaBtn.dataset.mediaKind,mediaBtn.dataset.mediaUrl,mediaBtn.dataset.mediaLabel);closeEmojiPanel();return}

      const sendGifUrl=e.target.closest('[data-send-gif-url]');
      if(sendGifUrl){
        const inp=document.getElementById('gif-url-input');
        const url=(inp?.value||'').trim();
        if(url){sendMedia('gif',url,'GIF');closeEmojiPanel();}
        return;
      }
    });

    /* ── IMAGE UPLOAD ── */
    function compressImage(dataUrl, mimeType='image/jpeg', maxW=600, maxH=600, quality=0.6){
      return new Promise(resolve=>{
        const img=new Image();
        img.onload=()=>{
          let w=img.width,h=img.height;
          if(w>maxW||h>maxH){
            const r=Math.min(maxW/w,maxH/h);
            w=Math.round(w*r);h=Math.round(h*r);
          }
          const c=document.createElement('canvas');c.width=w;c.height=h;
          c.getContext('2d').drawImage(img,0,0,w,h);
          const outType=(mimeType && mimeType.startsWith('image/')) ? mimeType : 'image/jpeg';
          resolve(outType === 'image/jpeg' ? c.toDataURL(outType, quality) : c.toDataURL(outType));
        };
        img.onerror=()=>resolve(dataUrl);
        img.src=dataUrl;
      });
    }
    D.fileInput.addEventListener('change',()=>{
      const files=Array.from(D.fileInput.files);
      D.fileInput.value='';
      files.forEach(file=>{
        if(!file.type.startsWith('image/')) return;
        const reader=new FileReader();
        reader.onload=ev=>{
          pendingImages.push({dataUrl:ev.target.result,file});
          renderImgPreview();
        };
        reader.readAsDataURL(file);
      });
    });

    function renderImgPreview(){
      if(!pendingImages.length){D.imgPreview.innerHTML='';D.imgPreview.classList.remove('has-files');return}
      D.imgPreview.classList.add('has-files');
      D.imgPreview.innerHTML=pendingImages.map((img,i)=>`
        <div class="img-thumb">
          <img src="${img.dataUrl}" alt="attach"/>
          <div class="rm-thumb" data-rm-img="${i}">✕</div>
        </div>`).join('');
    }
    D.imgPreview.addEventListener('click',e=>{
      const rm=e.target.closest('[data-rm-img]');
      if(rm){pendingImages.splice(+rm.dataset.rmImg,1);renderImgPreview()}
    });

    async function sendPendingImages(){
      if(!pendingImages.length) return;
      const imgs=[...pendingImages];
      pendingImages=[];
      renderImgPreview();
      for(const img of imgs){
        const compressed=await compressImage(img.dataUrl, img.file?.type || 'image/jpeg');
        sendMedia('image',compressed,'');
      }
    }

    /* ── HELPERS ── */
    function autoResize(){
      D.msgInput.style.height='auto';
      D.msgInput.style.height=Math.min(D.msgInput.scrollHeight,130)+'px';
    }
    function insertTextAtCursor(text){
      const ta=D.msgInput;
      const s=ta.selectionStart??ta.value.length,en=ta.selectionEnd??ta.value.length;
      ta.value=ta.value.slice(0,s)+text+ta.value.slice(en);
      const p=s+text.length;ta.focus();ta.setSelectionRange(p,p);
      autoResize();startTyping();clearTimeout(myTypTm);myTypTm=setTimeout(stopTyping,2000);
    }
    function startTyping(){
      if(myTyping||!ws||ws.readyState!==1||!me) return;
      myTyping=true;
      ws.send(JSON.stringify({type:'TYPING',sender:me,to:room==='global'?null:room,content:'',timestamp:'',id:''}));
    }
    function stopTyping(){
      if(!myTyping) return;myTyping=false;clearTimeout(myTypTm);
      if(ws&&ws.readyState===1&&me)
        ws.send(JSON.stringify({type:'TYPING_STOP',sender:me,to:room==='global'?null:room,content:'',timestamp:'',id:''}));
    }

    /* ── RENDER ── */
    function renderUsers(q=''){
      const others=allUsers.filter(k=>k!==me);
      const filt=others.filter(k=>dName(k).toLowerCase().includes(q.toLowerCase()));
      D.onlineCnt.textContent=others.length;
      D.usersList.innerHTML='';
      if(!filt.length){
        D.usersList.innerHTML=`<div style="padding:16px;font-size:12px;color:var(--t3);text-align:center"> Chưa có ai online…</div>`;
        return;
      }
      filt.forEach(key=>{
        const[bg,fg]=palOf(key);
        const name=dName(key),tag=dTag(key),badge=unread[key]||0,isAct=room===key;
        const row=document.createElement('div');
        row.className='nr'+(isAct?' active':'');row.dataset.user=key;
        row.innerHTML=`
          <div class="nr-av" style="background:${bg};color:${fg}">
            ${esc(name[0].toUpperCase())}<div class="sdot"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="nr-info">
            <div class="nr-name">${esc(name)}</div>
            <div class="nr-sub" style="font-family:var(--mono)">${esc(tag)} · online</div>
          </div>
          ${badge?`<div class="nr-badge">${badge>9?'9+':badge}</div>`:''}`;
        row.addEventListener('click',()=>{switchRoom(key);closeSidebar()});
        D.usersList.appendChild(row);
      });
    }

    function renderHeader(){
      if(room==='global'){
        D.chAv.textContent='';D.chAv.style.cssText='background:rgba(245,191,66,.13);color:var(--gold);width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:20px;flex-shrink:0';
        D.chName.textContent='Phòng chung';D.chSub.textContent=` ${allUsers.filter(k=>k!==me).length} người online`;
      }else{
        const[bg,fg]=palOf(room);
        D.chAv.textContent=dName(room)[0].toUpperCase();
        D.chAv.style.cssText=`background:${bg};color:${fg};width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:15px;font-weight:800;flex-shrink:0`;
        D.chName.textContent=dName(room);D.chSub.textContent=` Trò chuyện riêng · ${dTag(room)}`;
      }
    }

    function renderMsgs(){
      D.msgs.innerHTML='';
      const key=room==='global'?'global':room;
      const list=history[key]||[];
      if(!list.length){showEmpty();return}
      let lastDate=null,lastS=null;
      list.forEach(msg=>{
        const ds=fmtDate(msg.at||msg.timestamp||new Date().toISOString());
        if(ds!==lastDate){const sep=document.createElement('div');sep.className='date-sep';sep.textContent=ds;D.msgs.appendChild(sep);lastDate=ds;lastS=null}
        if(msg.type==='SYSTEM'||msg.type==='sys'){D.msgs.appendChild(makeSys(msg.content));lastS=null;return}
        const grouped=lastS===msg.sender;lastS=msg.sender;
        D.msgs.appendChild(makeBubble(msg,grouped));
      });
      scrollBot();
    }

    function showEmpty(){
      if(room==='global'){
        D.msgs.innerHTML=`<div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon"></div><h3>Phòng chung</h3><p>Chưa có tin nhắn nào.<br/>Hãy mở đầu cuộc trò chuyện!</p></div>`;
      }else{
        const[bg,fg]=palOf(room);const name=dName(room),tag=dTag(room);
        D.msgs.innerHTML=`<div class="empty">
          <div style="width:60px;height:60px;border-radius:50%;background:${bg};color:${fg};font-size:24px;font-weight:800;display:grid;place-items:center;margin:0 auto 10px">${esc(name[0].toUpperCase())}</div>
          <h3>${esc(name)} <span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--t3)">${esc(tag)}</span></h3>
          <p>Bắt đầu cuộc trò chuyện riêng </p></div>`;
      }
    }

    function makeSys(text){const d=document.createElement('div');d.className='sys-msg';d.innerHTML=`<span>${esc(text)}</span>`;return d}

    function makeBubble(msg,grouped){
      const isMine=msg.sender===me;
      const[bg,fg]=palOf(msg.sender||'');
      const name=dName(msg.sender||'');
      const media=decMedia(msg.content);
      const row=document.createElement('div');
      row.className=`mr${isMine?' me':''}${grouped?' grouped':''}`;

      const av=document.createElement('div');av.className='mr-av';av.style.cssText=`background:${bg};color:${fg}`;av.textContent=name[0]?.toUpperCase()||'?';av.title=name+' '+dTag(msg.sender||'');row.appendChild(av);

      const body=document.createElement('div');body.className='mr-body';
      if(!grouped&&!isMine){const sn=document.createElement('div');sn.className='mr-sender';sn.textContent=name;body.appendChild(sn)}

      if(media){
        if(media.kind==='image'){
          const bub=document.createElement('div');
          bub.className='bubble media';
          const wrap=document.createElement('div');wrap.className='media-img-wrap';
          const img=document.createElement('img');img.src=media.url;img.alt=media.label||'Ảnh';img.loading='lazy';img.referrerPolicy='no-referrer';
          img.addEventListener('click',()=>{
            document.getElementById('img-preview-img').src=media.url;
            document.getElementById('img-preview-overlay').classList.add('open');
          });
          img.addEventListener('error',()=>{bub.className='bubble';bub.textContent='️ Ảnh không tải được'});
          wrap.appendChild(img);bub.appendChild(wrap);
          const t=document.createElement('div');t.className='mr-time';t.textContent=fmtTime(msg.at||msg.timestamp||new Date().toISOString());
          body.appendChild(bub);body.appendChild(t);
        }else if(media.kind==='gif'){
          const bub=document.createElement('div');bub.className='bubble media';
          const wrap=document.createElement('div');wrap.className='media-img-wrap';
          const img=document.createElement('img');img.src=media.url;img.alt=media.label||'GIF';img.loading='lazy';img.referrerPolicy='no-referrer';
          img.addEventListener('error',()=>{bub.className='bubble';bub.textContent='GIF: '+media.url});
          wrap.appendChild(img);bub.appendChild(wrap);
          if(media.label){const cap=document.createElement('div');cap.className='media-cap';cap.textContent='GIF · '+media.label;bub.appendChild(cap)}
          const t=document.createElement('div');t.className='mr-time';t.textContent=fmtTime(msg.at||msg.timestamp||new Date().toISOString());
          body.appendChild(bub);body.appendChild(t);
        }else if(media.kind==='sticker'){
          const bub=document.createElement('div');bub.className='bubble media sticker-media';
          const img=document.createElement('img');img.src=media.url;img.alt=media.label||'Sticker';img.loading='lazy';img.referrerPolicy='no-referrer';
          img.addEventListener('error',()=>{bub.className='bubble';bub.textContent='Sticker: '+media.label});
          bub.appendChild(img);
          const t=document.createElement('div');t.className='mr-time';t.textContent=fmtTime(msg.at||msg.timestamp||new Date().toISOString());
          body.appendChild(bub);body.appendChild(t);
        }
      }else{
        /* Check if pure emoji */
        const isLargeEmoji=isPureEmoji(msg.content||'');
        const bub=document.createElement('div');
        bub.className=isLargeEmoji?'bubble media emoji-large':'bubble';
        bub.textContent=msg.content||'';
        const t=document.createElement('div');t.className='mr-time';t.textContent=fmtTime(msg.at||msg.timestamp||new Date().toISOString());
        body.appendChild(bub);body.appendChild(t);
      }
      row.appendChild(body);
      return row;
    }

    function isPureEmoji(str){
      if(!str||str.length>12) return false;
      const segs=[...new Intl.Segmenter('en',{granularity:'grapheme'}).segment(str)].map(s=>s.segment);
      if(segs.length>4) return false;
      return segs.every(s=>/\p{Emoji}/u.test(s));
    }

    function appendLive(msg){
      const es=D.msgs.querySelector('.empty');if(es)es.remove();
      const key=room==='global'?'global':room;
      if(msg.type==='SYSTEM'||msg.type==='sys'){D.msgs.appendChild(makeSys(msg.content));scrollBot();lastSndr[key]=null;return}
      const grouped=lastSndr[key]===msg.sender;lastSndr[key]=msg.sender;
      D.msgs.appendChild(makeBubble(msg,grouped));scrollBot();
    }

    const scrollBot=()=>requestAnimationFrame(()=>{D.msgsWrap.scrollTop=D.msgsWrap.scrollHeight});

    function setTyper(sender,roomId,active){
      if(!typing[roomId])typing[roomId]=new Set();
      const k=`${roomId}::${sender}`;
      if(active){typing[roomId].add(sender);clearTimeout(typingTm[k]);typingTm[k]=setTimeout(()=>{typing[roomId]?.delete(sender);renderTyping()},4000)}
      else typing[roomId]?.delete(sender);
      renderTyping();
    }
    function renderTyping(){
      const key=room==='global'?'global':room;
      const list=[...(typing[key]||[])];
      if(!list.length){D.typingBar.innerHTML='';D.typingH.textContent='';return}
      const names=list.slice(0,2).map(k=>dName(k)).join(', ');
      const txt=`${names} đang nhập…`;
      D.typingBar.innerHTML=`<div class="dots">${'<div class="dot"></div>'.repeat(3)}</div><span>${esc(txt)}</span>`;
      D.typingH.textContent='✏️ '+txt;
    }

    function incUnread(key){
      unread[key]=(unread[key]||0)+1;
      if(key==='global'){D.badgeGlb.textContent=unread[key]>9?'9+':unread[key];D.badgeGlb.style.display='grid'}
      renderUsers(D.search.value);
    }
    function clearUnread(key){
      unread[key]=0;
      if(key==='global')D.badgeGlb.style.display='none';
      renderUsers(D.search.value);
    }

    function switchRoom(r){
      room=r;clearUnread(r==='global'?'global':r);
      renderHeader();renderMsgs();renderTyping();closeEmojiPanel();
      document.querySelectorAll('.nr').forEach(row=>row.classList.toggle('active',
        (r==='global'&&row.dataset.room==='global')||row.dataset.user===r));
      if(r!=='global'&&ws&&ws.readyState===1&&!(history[r]&&history[r].length))
        ws.send(JSON.stringify({type:'DM_HISTORY',sender:me,to:r,content:'',timestamp:'',id:''}));
      D.msgInput.focus();
    }

    function setupProfile(key){
      const[bg,fg]=palOf(key);const name=dName(key),tag=dTag(key);
      D.myAv.style.cssText=`background:${bg};color:${fg};width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;display:grid;place-items:center;font-weight:800;font-size:14px;position:relative;flex-shrink:0`;
      D.myAv.innerHTML=`${esc(name[0].toUpperCase())}<div class="sdot on"></div>`;
      D.myName.textContent=name;D.myTag.textContent=tag;
      D.brandSt.classList.add('on');
    }

    function sendPayload(content){
      if(!ws||!me||ws.readyState!==1) return;
      // Không trim nếu là media (base64 không được bị cắt xén)
      const text=content&&content.startsWith('__MC_MEDIA__')?content:(content||'').trim();
      if(!text) return;
      if(room==='global')ws.send(JSON.stringify({type:'GLOBAL',sender:me,to:null,content:text,timestamp:'',id:''}));
      else ws.send(JSON.stringify({type:'DM',sender:me,to:room,content:text,timestamp:'',id:''}));
    }

    async function send(){
      if(!ws||!me||ws.readyState!==1) return;
      /* Send pending images first */
      await sendPendingImages();
      const content=D.msgInput.value.trim();
      if(!content) return;
      D.msgInput.value='';autoResize();stopTyping();closeEmojiPanel();
      sendPayload(content);
    }

    /* ── EVENTS ── */
    D.msgInput.addEventListener('input',()=>{autoResize();startTyping();clearTimeout(myTypTm);myTypTm=setTimeout(stopTyping,2000)});
    D.msgInput.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Enter'&&!e.shiftKey){e.preventDefault();send()}});
    D.sendBtn.addEventListener('click',send);
    D.inpUser.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Enter')login()});
    D.search.addEventListener('input',e=>renderUsers(e.target.value));
    D.emojiBtn.addEventListener('click',e=>{e.stopPropagation();toggleEmojiPanel()});
    document.addEventListener('click',e=>{
      if(!D.emojiPanel.contains(e.target)&&!D.emojiBtn.contains(e.target)) closeEmojiPanel();
    });

    /* ── LOGIN ── */
    function login(){
      const username=D.inpUser.value.trim();
      D.loginErr.textContent='';
      if(!username){D.loginErr.textContent='⚠️ Vui lòng nhập tên.';return}
      if(username.length<2){D.loginErr.textContent='⚠️ Tên ít nhất 2 ký tự.';return}
      D.loginBtn.disabled=true;D.loginBtn.innerHTML='<span>⏳</span> Đang kết nối…';
      try{ws=new WebSocket(SERVER_URL)}catch(e){D.loginErr.textContent='❌ Địa chỉ server không hợp lệ.';resetBtn();return}
      ws.onopen=()=>ws.send(JSON.stringify({type:'GLOBAL',sender:'',to:null,content:username,timestamp:'',id:''}));
      ws.onerror=()=>{D.loginErr.textContent='❌ Không kết nối được. Kiểm tra server đang chạy.';resetBtn();ws.close()};
      ws.onmessage=ev=>{
        try{
          const msg=JSON.parse(ev.data);
          if(msg.type==='ERROR'&&!me){D.loginErr.textContent='❌ '+(msg.content||'Lỗi.');resetBtn();ws.close();return}
          if(msg.type==='WELCOME'){
            me=msg.you;allUsers=msg.users||[];
            const hist=(msg.history||[]).map(m=>({...m,at:m.timestamp||m.at}));
            history['global']=hist;lastSndr['global']=hist.length?hist[hist.length-1].sender:null;
            setupProfile(me);D.msgInput.disabled=false;D.sendBtn.disabled=false;
            D.overlay.classList.add('hidden');renderUsers();renderMsgs();renderHeader();D.msgInput.focus();
            bindWS();
          }
        }catch(e){console.error(e)}
      };
      ws.onclose=()=>{if(!me){D.loginErr.textContent='❌ Kết nối bị đóng.';resetBtn()}};
    }

    function resetBtn(){D.loginBtn.disabled=false;D.loginBtn.innerHTML='<span></span> Vào phòng chat'}

    function bindWS(){
      ws.onmessage=ev=>{try{handle(JSON.parse(ev.data))}catch(e){console.error(e)}};
      ws.onclose=()=>{
        const s={type:'sys',content:'⚠️ Mất kết nối server',sender:'SYSTEM',at:new Date().toISOString()};
        pushHist('global',s);if(room==='global')appendLive(s);
        D.msgInput.disabled=true;D.sendBtn.disabled=true;D.brandSt.classList.remove('on');
      };
    }

    function handle(msg){
      switch(msg.type){
        case'USER_LIST':allUsers=msg.users||[];renderUsers(D.search.value);renderHeader();break;
        case'SYSTEM':{const m={...msg,at:msg.timestamp||new Date().toISOString()};pushHist('global',m);if(room==='global')appendLive(m);break}
        case'GLOBAL':{const m={...msg,at:msg.timestamp||new Date().toISOString()};pushHist('global',m);if(room==='global')appendLive(m);else incUnread('global');break}
        case'DM':{const key=msg.sender===me?msg.to:msg.sender;const m={...msg,at:msg.timestamp||new Date().toISOString()};pushHist(key,m);if(room===key)appendLive(m);else incUnread(key);break}
        case'DM_HISTORY':{const o=msg.to;if(!(history[o]&&history[o].length)){history[o]=(msg.messages||[]).map(m=>({...m,at:m.timestamp||m.at}));lastSndr[o]=history[o].length?history[o][history[o].length-1].sender:null;if(room===o)renderMsgs()}break}
        case'TYPING':setTyper(msg.sender,msg.to||'global',true);break;
        case'TYPING_STOP':setTyper(msg.sender,msg.to||'global',false);break;
      }
    }

    function pushHist(key,msg){
      if(!history[key])history[key]=[];history[key].push(msg);
      if(history[key].length>500)history[key].shift();
      if(room===(key==='global'?'global':key))lastSndr[key]=msg.sender;
    }

    /* Seed name */
    const adj=['Cool','Fast','Smart','Lucky','Happy','Bold','Calm','Brave','Quick','Wise','Shiny','Wild'];
    const noun=['Tiger','Fox','Eagle','Panda','Wolf','Bear','Hawk','Lion','Deer','Owl','Koi','Lynx'];
    D.inpUser.value=adj[Math.random()*adj.length|0]+noun[Math.random()*noun.length|0]+(Math.random()*90+10|0);

    return{login,switchRoom,send};
  })();
</script>
</body>
</html>
